attempts.summary: Ran sec_analytics analyzer dns-tunnel over 2026-04-13..2026-04-20 to find high-volume DNS to a single domain with many unique subdomains and TXT-heavy pattern, then formatted result.

answer.evidence: 10.0.2.45 made ~1500 TXT queries to data-corp.io with 1500 unique subdomains between 2026-04-13 and 2026-04-20.
